reviewTexts: I love this place! Their cakes are awesome. We've tried pretty much all the cakes and they always hit just right. If you are a fan of not overly sweet cakes, this place is a must try. Their match ice cream is also very nice and flavorful. Nice, spacious seatings. You might not be able to find a seat when it's crowded. Parking is difficult (but this is because the entire area has very limited parking).

I had a frustrating experience at Kyo Matcha. We walked in at 9:55 PM, and there were still several customers inside. While one employee was counting the register, we began placing our order on the kiosk—only to be told by staff that they were already closed.

This was confusing, considering the posted closing time is 10:00 PM. Closing five minutes early while customers are still actively trying to order feels inconsistent and unprofessional.
When I asked for a corporate contact to follow up, I was told they didn’t have one. That response was also surprising, given that this is a branded business operating under a larger name.

If a business advertises a closing time, it should honor it—or at the very least clearly communicate any early closure. I hope management takes a closer look at how closing procedures are handled to avoid this happening to other customers.
Love the soft serve ice cream and banana milk. Sometimes my ice cream sizes varies too much especially when it’s like $8 I expect a decent portion.

Pittsburgh needs more cozy coffee shops with this sort of vibe! Tons of wall plugs and comfortable seating, making it a great spot to get some work done. All while enjoying a yummy matcha, too!

Can get crowded and a bit loud at times, but that's a testament to how much people love this place!

Got the Sakura cheesecake, Sakura rain cake, and matcha latte. The cakes were good, not too strong Sakura flavor. The matcha latte was rich and creamy and sweet. The best matcha I’ve had in a long time. Decor was cute and relaxing and very green! 💚 you order on a kiosk, which is nice.
One of our favorites on Forbes. And our kid dropped Matcha ice cream for the 2nd time!

unfair_advantage.label: social momentum
unfair_advantage.evidence: Social momentum is the standout here, awaiting Instagram data in the next scrape to show the exact margin.
